response.justification: This candidate is fundamentally misaligned with the role requirements. While they demonstrate excellent software engineering practices and communication skills, they lack the mandatory technical foundation: only 6 months of documented C++ professional experience (vs. required 5–10 years), no Windows platform background, minimal SQL demonstration, and zero exposure to capital markets, fixed-income, or investment-banking domains. Their career trajectory over the past decade has focused on full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript, React) rather than systems-level C++ work.
strengths: Exceptional communication and mentoring ability, demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and open-source projects
Strong software engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD expertise, trunk-based development, and infrastructure automation
Diverse polyglot programming background with proven ability to learn new technical domains quickly
concerns: Critically insufficient C++ experience: only ~6 months of professional C++ work documented (National Instruments), far below the required 5–10 years
Zero financial-services domain knowledge: no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, investment banking, or related financial systems
Recent career direction misaligned with role: last 10+ years focused on web/full-stack development (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js) rather than systems-level C++ or Windows platform development
